name: Sync-in
description: Sync-in is a self-hosted platform for file storage, synchronization, and team collaboration. Features include drag-and-drop uploads, OIDC/LDAP authentication, WebDAV support, full-text search, and online document editing with OnlyOffice or Collabora.

notes.text: Change the default credentials (sync-in / sync-in) immediately after first login.
Configuration and generated secrets are stored in /opt/sync-in/environment.yaml.
Files are stored in /opt/sync-in/data. Increase disk size accordingly.
